title: ElBlanco's 2D lightsabers
description: Give your Star Wars role play that classic Minecraft feel with 2D lightsabers
body:
Welcome To ElBlanco's 2D lightsaber Resource Pack. Ever wanted to have your favorite Lightsabers added to the game, but still wanted that vanilla, 2d weapons style of minecraft. Look know further, in this pack there are 18 unique lightsaber textures added to the game. Simple rename your sword EXACTLY to any of the lightsabers below.

Lightsabers:

Anakin's Lightsaber

Count Dooku's Lightsaber

Dark Saber (Clone Wars)

Dark Saber (Mandalorian)

Darth Maul's Double Lightsaber

Darth Maul"s Single Lightsaber

Darth Revan's Lightsaber 

Revan's Lightsaber

Darth Sidious's Lightsaber

Darth Vaders Lightsaber

Kylo Ren's Lightsaber

Luke's Lightsaber

Mace Windu's Lightsaber

Obi-Wan's Lightsaber

Plo-Koon's Lightsaber

Qui-Gons's Lightsaber

Yoda's Lightsaber
